data.body: MILESTONE (session 2): Gerrit 229+230 MERGED (a425 lint fix + 8903 auto-deploy code). Box-adapted autodeploy for copy-based /opt/rebar (mirror clone + rsync, review-bot-only v1 auto-apply, config detect+signal); plan re-gated PASS; landed via Gerrit 231 (MERGED, main=463739cdb). STAGED ROLLOUT COMPLETE on box i-00880b2c7f13527c5 — auto-deploy LIVE (rebar-autodeploy.timer, 2min): dry-run redeployed review-bot with S2 code (S5 PREREQ SATISFIED — bot was pre-S2, now has merge-change path); autonomous timer fire verified (rebuild + idempotent no-op); self-heal verified (forced health-fail -> rollback to :prev, deployed-sha not advanced, gate up, gerrit untouched); blast radius held (gerrit id ef56267f unchanged); .env byte-identical; deploy_errors CloudWatch alarm APPLIED. 8903 CLOSED+SIGNED. ADR 0026 added. NEXT: S3 AC4/AC5, S4 docs+sweep, S5 7-scenario live E2E (prereq ready), S6 policy/back-out/cost. Follow-ups open: spy-luge-wool, fern-belief-gap, merge_change_409_guard event.
